question: After some alcoholic beverages, you are required to operate a UA the next day. You ____

options.text: must not operate the UA as if your alcohol level is more than 0.1mg.
must not operate any UA within 8 hours of consuming any alcoholic beverage.
must ensure that your visual observer has not consumed any alcoholic beverages in the previous 12 hours.
may act as a crewmember other than the PIC.
